title: ferray-random: missing distributions — zipf, noncentral_chisquare, noncentral_f, multivariate_hypergeometric
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy Generator provides these distributions that ferray-random is missing: zipf (Zipf/Zeta), noncentral_chisquare, noncentral_f, multivariate_hypergeometric. ferray-random has: uniform, integers, normal, lognormal, exponential, gamma, beta, chisquare, f, student_t, poisson, binomial, negative_binomial, geometric, hypergeometric, logseries, laplace, logistic, rayleigh, weibull, pareto, gumbel, power, triangular, vonmises, wald, standard_cauchy, multinomial, multivariate_normal, dirichlet. The noncentral variants and zipf are used in specialized statistical applications.
